evals.name: scan-risky-repo
expectations: Findings include hardcoded credential or environment-file exposure
Findings include unsafe HTML rendering detection
Findings include shell-enabled subprocess execution detection
Findings include insecure JWT handling detection
Findings include at least one file:line style location

evals.name: report-markdown
expectations: Markdown report contains the target title
Markdown report contains fix effort information

evals.name: report-sarif
expectations: SARIF output contains at least one result
SARIF output includes file location data
